title: VSB STB - Deep Sleep Longer-Duration Recovery
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. Internet connection is available. Remote is paired and responsive. Deep sleep or power saving behavior is available in the test environment. Playable content is available.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.data: Press LEFT arrow on remote and navigate to Stillingar

steps.step: Open Skjáhvíla or power saving settings
steps.expectedResult: Screensaver or power saving settings screen opens

steps.step: Verify Deep sleep option is visible
steps.expectedResult: Deep sleep option is visible when supported by the test environment

steps.step: Enable or confirm Deep sleep setting
steps.expectedResult: Deep sleep setting is enabled or confirmed

steps.step: Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Put STB into standby or deep sleep
steps.data: Use remote Power button or configured deep sleep method for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: STB enters standby or deep sleep state successfully

steps.step: Leave STB in deep sleep for the configured test duration
steps.data: Use the duration defined for the test run, for example overnight or another agreed longer-duration interval
steps.expectedResult: STB remains in deep sleep or expected low-power state during the wait period

steps.data: Use remote Power button or configured wake method
steps.expectedResult: STB wakes successfully from deep sleep

steps.step: Verify HDMI output after deep sleep wake
steps.expectedResult: HDMI signal returns and startup, resume or Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Verify remote control after deep sleep wake
Verify internet connection after deep sleep wake
steps.expectedResult: STB reconnects to the internet successfully

steps.step: Verify login/session state after deep sleep wake
steps.expectedResult: User remains logged in or is shown expected login/profile screen

steps.step: Start live TV playback after deep sleep wake
Start VOD playback after deep sleep wake
Verify audio after deep sleep wake
Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed and STB is stable after deep sleep recovery
